regional_summary_6h.headline: MENA index 2.04 (STABLE, steady) driven by Iran

bullets.text: Iran's ongoing military conflicts with neighboring countries contribute to regional instability
Diplomatic tensions between Iran and other nations, including the US, remain high due to proxy wars and territorial disputes
Iran's support for militant groups, such as Hezbollah, exacerbates border security concerns and humanitarian crises in affected areas

markets.method_note: Threat beta = OLS of daily log-returns on the index change at the lead lag; launch-day estimates lean on BNTI-seeded history. Association, not causation.
